hero_image_alt: PressFriends volunteers at our Spring Media Workshop
headline: A Month of Growth, Connection, and Community
body_paragraphs: This past month has been one of our most active and inspiring yet at PressFriends. Our student volunteers have worked tirelessly to amplify important voices in our community, producing compelling stories that spark real conversations and drive positive change.

From hosting our Spring Writing Workshop to partnering with local schools on journalism mentorship, our team has shown what's possible when young people are given the tools and the platform to lead. We are proud of each and every one of them.

Looking ahead to June, we have several exciting initiatives in the works — including SportsFriends at the Boys and Girls Club [Location] and ArtFriends at [X] Elementary School in Wilmington. None of this would be possible without the incredible support of parents, donors, and community members like you.
featured_story: This month's volunteer spotlight: Senior volunteer Maya Rodriguez spent over 50 hours organizing our first-ever student journalism conference, bringing together 120 students from 8 schools. Her leadership and passion embody everything PressFriends stands for.
spotlight_image_alt: Maya Rodriguez at the student journalism conference
